steps.title: Identify the explicitly stated fact
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that the Hispanic Society “has more than 18,000 objects in its museum collection.”

steps.title: Match the fact to the answer
steps.content: Choice A directly states that the collection contains over 18,000 objects—exactly what the passage says. Choices B and C contradict the passage (current NYC location and 1904 founding date, respectively), while D claims information about comparative visitor numbers that the passage never provides. That matches choice A — A is correct.
